creative_direction.reasoning: Single phone with rich UI content (photorealistic render) paired with a three-word typographic headline. Headline must be pixel-perfect (brand tagline moment) — Track B. Generate cream canvas + pink app icon + one full-UI phone cropped on right edge.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Three-word tagline ad — 'Quick. Easy. Airbnb.' — paired with a single phone showing the app in use.

nano_banana_json.scene: Warm cream canvas with Airbnb pink app icon top-center, three-word ExtraBold black headline 'Quick. Easy. Airbnb.' below, and a single iPhone at 3/4 scale in the bottom 65% showing the Airbnb Homes home screen with recently viewed listings grid. Phone is cropped on the right edge (~10% trim).

camera.style: photorealistic phone render, flat graphic canvas

color_palette.role: Airbnb Rausch app icon + Homes tab accent
listing interior warm tones (Mexico City/Coyoacán) — multiple

vertical_zones: Top 10%: Airbnb rounded-square app icon (Rausch pink with white Bélo)
Top 20-32%: three-word ExtraBold Title Case headline 'Quick. Easy. Airbnb.'
Bottom 35-100%: single iPhone at 3/4 scale, cropped ~10% at right edge

text_elements_in_image.notes: Three words each ending in a period — periods are load-bearing to the rhythm

phone_ui_content.search_bar: white rounded pill with magnifier icon, text 'Start your search' in gray
phone_ui_content.tabs: Three tabs: Homes (with small house-icon, selected/underlined), Experiences (with hot-air-balloon icon, NEW red-pill badge), Services (with bell icon, NEW red-pill badge)
phone_ui_content.recently_viewed: 'Recently viewed homes >' label followed by a horizontal grid of 4 square listing thumbnails. Listings visible left-to-right: Mexico City (orange chair interior, 2 beds, ★ 4.93), Mexico City (pink bedroom, 5 beds, ★ 4.92), Coyoacán (blue fireplace architectural interior, 6 beds, ★ 4.95), and a fourth partially cropped listing. Each thumbnail has a small heart icon top-right and city/bed-count/rating below.

negative_prompt: no blurred UI — phone screen must be legibly detailed

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Cream canvas + app icon + phone with full UI, all baked. Only the headline text is overlaid in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Warm cream #F2ECE3 canvas. Top 10%: centered Airbnb rounded-square app icon (pink, Bélo inside). Bottom 65%: single iPhone at 3/4 scale, cropped ~10% at right edge, showing Airbnb Homes home screen with status bar, search pill, tabs row with NEW badges, 'Recently viewed homes' grid of 4 square thumbnails (Mexico City orange-chair, Mexico City pink bedroom, Coyoacán blue fireplace, 4th partial). Middle 20-32% reserved empty cream space for overlaid headline.
negative_prompt: no headline text in reserved zone
no marketing copy outside phone UI

elements.notes: Periods MUST be present — tagline rhythm depends on them

assets.name: Airbnb Homes home screen UI
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: iOS screen: 9:41 status, 'Start your search' white pill with magnifier, three tabs (Homes underlined with house icon, Experiences with balloon and red NEW badge, Services with bell and red NEW badge), 'Recently viewed homes >' label, 4 square listing thumbnails with heart icons and city/beds/star-rating labels.

patterns_exemplified: CP-3 three-word headline ending in brand name
C1 product UI integrated into ad
prompt_writer_training_notes: Three-word tagline is a precise rhythm — period after EACH word, including the brand name. 'Quick. Easy. Airbnb.' not 'Quick, Easy, Airbnb' or 'Quick Easy Airbnb!'. Phone right-edge crop is intentional 'there's more' energy — instruct 'cropped ~10% at right edge' explicitly. NEW badges on Experiences and Services tabs are a deliberate product-launch signal — preserve them. Cream hex (#F2ECE3) matches airbnb-ad-2 for campaign consistency.
